positive: A vibrant, stylized minimalist illustration of a celestial forest scene. Central composition featuring exaggerated glowing bioluminescent mushrooms, interconnected vines, and giant, stylized tropical leaves. The style should be modern graphic illustration, inspired by Art Nouveau and vaporwave aesthetics, emphasizing clean silhouettes and high contrast. The color palette should be limited but vivid: deep indigo and midnight blue backgrounds contrasting sharply with glowing neon teal, electric magenta, and acid lime accents. Include delicate celestial elements like crescent moons and stylized nebulas integrated into the foliage. The composition must be highly suitable for repeat pattern mapping or a central apparel graphic, with sharp lines and flat areas of intense color. Cinematic, ethereal lighting, highly detailed.
negative: text, watermark, logo, signature, realistic photo, blurred, low resolution, artifacts, grain, noise, extra limbs, bad anatomy, human, cropped, out of frame
